name: GovChat Overheidscrawler
description: Allowlist crawler met robots.txt-respect en run-audit logging

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ ({ run_id: $json.run_id, status: 'skipped', trigger: $json.trigger, started_at: $json.started_at, finished_at: $json.finished_at, summary: $json.summary, error: $json.skip_reason || $json.error || null }) }}

={{ ({ run_id: $json.run_id, status: 'finished', trigger: $json.trigger, started_at: $json.started_at, finished_at: $json.finished_at, summary: $json.summary, indexed_pages: $json.indexed_pages || [], token_usage: $json.token_usage || {}, error: $json.error || null }) }}
